articles.title: MN lawmakers target prediction markets at State Capitol
articles.summary: Minnesota legislators are moving to regulate or restrict prediction markets operating within state boundaries. If successful, this could set a precedent for other states to crack down on political betting platforms, potentially forcing operators to geo-block users or face legal challenges.

articles.title: MLB names Polymarket exclusive Prediction Market Exchange partner and signs agreement with CFTC to establish integrity framework
articles.summary: MLB just made Polymarket its official prediction market partner and worked out a deal with the CFTC to create new integrity rules for baseball betting markets. This legitimizes prediction markets in professional sports and could open the floodgates for other major leagues to follow suit, bringing real liquidity to sports prediction trading.

articles.title: Point72, Balyasny Ban Staff Bets in Prediction-Market Crackdown
articles.summary: Two major hedge funds just banned their employees from betting on prediction markets, signaling Wall Street's growing concern about potential conflicts of interest. The crackdown suggests institutional money is taking prediction markets seriously enough to worry about insider information flowing from trading floors to betting platforms.

articles.title: Public relations firm picks bar fight with Polymarket
articles.summary: A PR firm has launched some kind of public attack or controversy targeting Polymarket, the world's largest prediction market platform. This creates regulatory and reputational risk for Polymarket right as it's gaining mainstream attention, which could spook institutional money and give competitors an opening to steal market share.

articles.title: Could prediction markets deflate ‘March Madness’ revenue for NH?
articles.summary: New Hampshire lawmakers are worried that prediction markets could siphon revenue away from their March Madness sports betting bonanza. If prediction markets gain legal traction, traditional sportsbooks might lose their monopoly on basketball tournament action, forcing states to rethink their gambling revenue projections.

articles.title: People Are Making Money Betting on Pretaped ‘Survivor’ Episodes
articles.summary: Bettors are finding ways to profit on Survivor episodes that were filmed months ago, exploiting information asymmetries about predetermined outcomes. This exposes a fundamental flaw in entertainment betting markets where the "future" event already happened, creating insider trading opportunities that could force sportsbooks to rethink how they handle reality TV wagers.

articles.title: Exclusive | Kalshi Cinches $22 Billion Valuation in Ongoing Round
articles.summary: Kalshi just locked in a $22 billion valuation in its current funding round, making it one of the most valuable fintech companies in the world. This war chest gives them serious ammunition to expand into new markets and fend off competitors trying to muscle into the regulated prediction market space they've carved out.

articles.title: Prediction markets are trying to lure journalists with partnership deals
articles.summary: Prediction market platforms are offering partnership deals to journalists and news organizations, likely providing data access, revenue sharing, or exclusive content arrangements. These partnerships could legitimize prediction markets in mainstream media while giving platforms valuable editorial credibility and wider audience reach.

articles.title: Opinion | Both parties fear this betting craze. Blinding the public won’t help.
articles.summary: Politicians from both sides want to crack down on the betting boom that's reshaping how Americans engage with politics and current events. The regulatory backlash threatens to push prediction markets underground just when they're proving most valuable for price discovery and public sentiment tracking.

articles.title: The Odds of Me Being Mauled by a Bear This Weekend Keep Going Up on Kalshi
articles.summary: Someone's personal bear attack odds are literally trading on Kalshi, turning what should be a camping trip into a tradeable event. This signals prediction markets are getting weird enough to price individual people's weekend activities, which means either we've found the bottom of the barrel for betting opportunities or we're about to see a flood of hyper-personal prediction contracts.

articles.title: MLB reaches agreements with Polymarket, federal commission
articles.summary: MLB signed deals with Polymarket and a federal commission, likely expanding official data partnerships and regulatory oversight into crypto-based sports betting. The move signals mainstream sports leagues are embracing prediction markets while potentially creating new compliance frameworks that could legitimize crypto betting platforms.

articles.title: Polymarket Is Opening a Pop-Up Bar at DC’s Proper 21
articles.summary: Polymarket is launching a temporary bar at Proper 21 in Washington DC, bringing prediction markets directly to the political power center during what's likely a key election period. The move signals Polymarket's push to mainstream political betting and court DC insiders who could shape the regulatory future of prediction markets.
